title: The Struggle with Lust
subtitle: Confession under tension; restraint without emotional reward
description: An artifact documenting confession under tension. It captures the split between immediate desire, post-act clarity, and chosen restraint, identifying a deeper fracture between the principle of connection and the fear of intimacy.

motifMap.meaning: Choosing restraint without emotional reward; binding across time through a promise.

excerpt: I wanna beat off. I just can’t help it. I am not. ... I love and trust marriage… but I am scared of intimacy.
